hypothesis: An ATR-normalized intraday divergence between two highly related US indices can mean-revert as a market-neutral long-laggard/short-leader pair, adding dense return with less common market-direction MAE than a single-index sleeve.

execution_contract.feature: At a completed 30/60/120-minute US cash-session window, subtract each leg's session-open-to-close move normalized by its own lagged ATR56.
execution_contract.entry: At the next synchronized M15 open, short the stronger leg and buy the weaker leg with equal normalized ATR contribution.
execution_contract.exit: Joint portfolio stop, joint target, or fixed synchronized hold; no overnight exposure.
execution_contract.same_bar_rule: Joint adverse extremes are evaluated before joint favorable extremes, assuming both legs reach their adverse intrabar prices together.

selection_contract.preholdout_gate: DEV trades>=150 PF>=1.15 net>0; validation trades>=25 PF>=1.05 net>0; at least four positive development years
selection_contract.selection: One global family winner by the lower of development and validation PF, then development trade count.
selection_contract.holdout_open_rule: Only a preholdout survivor may be recomputed through 2025.
selection_contract.holdout_gate: trades>=50 PF>=1.10 net>0 and both 2024 and 2025 positive

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
